creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've asked if NVidia could make an exception in this case for us on their official forum:

https://devtalk.nvidia.com/default/topic/795960/freebsd/cve-2014-8298-please-update-173-14-xx-version-/

Little to no hope remains, but it's better raise one's voice rather than keep being silent.

In the mean time, I'm considering updating -173 driver port to 73.14.39 (ir)regardless of the fact that it's currently being marked forbidden.
